chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No. 1891 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 19.12.2016. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G alongwith DSP Imtiaz Baloch, Satellite Town, Mirpurkhas, and Inspector Allan Abbasi, Police Line, Mirpurkhas. -.-.-. None present for the petitioner. However, on Court orders Inspector Allan Abbasi is present and denies the allegations mentioned in the petition. Parawise comments have been filed by different police officials wherein, inter alia, it has been mentioned that police officials are not involved in any such harassment with further undertaking that police officials will provide protection to the petitioner if the same is sought. This petition is disposed of on the undertaking of police officials and with the directions that no harassment should be caused to the petitioner. JUDGE Ali Haider
